case_title: JIAN WU KAO VS. YEE MUI LEE YANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-23-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CHELSEY TOM INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CHESLEY TOM INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY YANG, YEE MUI LEE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY YANG, YEE MUI LEE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT YANG, YEE MUI LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2009 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-27-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DUE TO ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS BEING IN CANTONESE, THE COURT HAS CONTINUED MATTER TO HAVE DOCUMENTS TRANSLATED INTO ENGLISH. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YANG, YEE MUI LEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YANG, YEE MUI LEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KAO, JIAN WU DBA ART BUSINESS EXCHANGE OF EAST & WEST COMPANY ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF JIAN WU KAO IS ORDERED TO RETURN TO DEFENDANT ANY ART WORKS IN HIS POSSESSION OR UNDER HIS CONTROL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
